div.h3: CUDA Memory Hierarchy & Atomic Operation Optimization

p.em: Per-block private histograms in shared memory

ul.li: Naive Pattern: N global atomics = 16,777,216 operations.
Privatized Pattern: numBlocks × numBins = 64 × 256 = 16,384 global operations.
Efficiency Gain: ~1024× reduction in DRAM contention.
Resource Usage: 256 bins × 4 bytes = 1,024 Bytes per block.
Occupancy: High occupancy maintained (64KB total shared footprint).
Thread synchronization (__syncthreads()) is required before merging local results to global memory.
localHist must be initialized to zero for every block.
